name: Green Bean and Red Onion Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pan of water to boil. Trim the green beans, cutting them in halves or thirds if long. Put the beans into the boiling water and cook for about five minutes, or until tender. Drain and rinse with cold water until completely chilled. Pat dry with paper towels.
2. Soak the red onion in cold water for 5 minutes to reduce acidity. Drain and pat dry. Combine with the green beans, parsley, mint, Parmesan, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Mix well. The salad can be refrigerated at this point.
3. Serve the salad at room temperature. Just before serving, stir in the vinegar.
